title: Migrate Artifact Pulling Code to c/common
body: Podman implemented artifact handling in [artifact.go](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/2cbb5fead9712b9b1634171f4106db1b47ccf026/pkg/domain/infra/abi/artifact.go), and CRI-O is also interested in supporting artifact pulling. To reduce duplication and simplify maintenance, it would be beneficial to move this functionality to containers/common, allowing both projects to share and iterate on it. This approach would enable CRI-O to adapt the logic as needed. Would the Podman team be open to discussing how we can facilitate this transition?

comments.body:
The artifact code is still in very early development so it requires many changes currently, moving this to c/common before we landed most features would make it much much harder for us to work/iterate on it.

That said I believe the goal was to move this as a library somewhere and I think that is still our goal once we have all the functionality we need.

cc @baude

Yes, we certainly WILL move it once things slow down a bit.  We are considering a possible move of `pkg/libartifact` to `containers/libartifact`.  I would expect this to happen in the next 2 months.  Also, to be clear, the file you point to is not under consideration for move.  It will only be `pkg/libartifact`.  Happy to hear if you believe it should be otherwise.
